channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Pokémon Champions Best Starters: Which Pokémon to Recruit First
item.content:encoded:
A new Pokémon game is now available following the global release of Pokémon Champions, resulting in yet another starter decision to make, but the vast differences from previous titles mean choosing the best starters in Pokémon Champions varies.

In Pokémon Champions, players are presented with a choice of 10 starter Pokémon at the beginning of the game, providing the first team member for their competitive squad. However, once the selection is made, additional Pokémon are added to your roster to create a full team.

That results in additional headaches when weighing up which Pokémon to choose, but Insider Gaming is here to help with a breakdown of the best starters in Pokémon Champions.

Best Starters in Pokémon Champions

The best starter to choose in Pokémon Champions largely comes down to personal choice and what you have available to transfer over from Pokémon Home, but there are some options better than others.

Pikachu is a solid choice for beginners, as it has the Static ability that can Paralyze any opponent who makes physical contact in battle, and while it’s not the strongest of the available Pokémon, the additional party members you will receive in addition to Pikachu result in a well-rounded choice.

Tyranitar is also a very good option to consider, as it’s the only Pokémon in the starter list that immediately has a weather move, and it has a wide range of move types to utilize.

  • More Insider Gaming: How to Connect Pokémon Champions to Pokémon Home

Additional options to consider are Charizard, which has the Blaze ability that powers up Fire-type moves when low on health, and Gardevoir, which has the strong Fairy/Psychic types.

However, if there is a Pokémon on the list of starters that you don’t have access to from another game, it might be wise to pick it up to broaden your options, although Pokémon recruited in Pokémon Champions cannot be transferred out of the game.

All Starter Choices in Pokémon Champions

There are 10 starter Pokémon to choose from in Pokémon Champions, each of which provides a different party composition with additional members being added once you have made your choice.

These make great beginner teams, providing well-rounded options to give you a full spread in battle, and can, of course, be customized fully by adding and removing Pokémon, tweaking moves, Abilities, and more.

  • More Insider Gaming: All Pokémon Champions Mystery Gift Codes

The table below shows all of the starter options in Pokémon Champions, their default abilities, team members they come with, and more.

Can You Get More Starters in Pokémon Champions

Yes, multiple starters are available in Pokémon Champions, and choosing your starter Pokémon does not lock you out of obtaining the Pokémon you elected not to pick.

The Pokémon shown when selecting your starter can all appear again in the Recruit Pokémon option, and can also be transferred into Pokémon Champions through Pokémon Home.

However, you won’t be able to obtain the full team compositions from the starter selections in one swing, as recruiting them won’t include any additional freebies.

What are your initial impressions of Pokémon Champions? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Pokémon, find out when the first events using Champions for VGC will take place, and check out all the release details for Chaos Rising in the Pokémon TCG.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

https://insider-gaming.com/pokemon-champions-best-starters/

item.title: New Forza Horizon 6 Limited Edition Xbox Accessories Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Forza Horizon 6 is receiving a limited-edition Xbox Wireless controller and headset as launch accessories.

In just over a month, players will be able to race through the streets of Tokyo with over 550 cars once Forza Horizon 6 arrives on May 19, 2026. The developers have already provided players with the full Japan map of the upcoming title. Now, a report has informed us about the promotional Xbox accessories available with FH6.

Forza Horizon 6 Xbox Wireless Controller and Headset Price & Release Date Details Revealed

A new report by the reliable billbil-kun from Dealabs reveals the upcoming Xbox accessories for Forza Horizon 6. Players will receive a new wireless controller along with a wireless headset featuring Forza Horizon 6 colors. This is the first new headset since Starfield’s release. Both the controller and the headset will be available on release day, May 19. Interested readers can check out the price for Europe, the United Kingdom, and the United States below.

  • Forza Horizon 6 Limited Edition Xbox Wireless Controller: €89.99 / £84.99 / $89.99
  • Forza Horizon 6 Limited Edition Xbox Wireless Headset: €134.99 / £124.99 / $134.99

It seems the price of the Limited Edition wireless controllers has increased: the DOOM: The Dark Ages controller costs €79.99, and the Forza Horizon 6 controller costs €89.99. The announcement date has not been revealed, and the accessories will be available through the Microsoft Store and authorized retailers. Players might get additional accessories exclusive to the Microsoft Store, but nothing else has been confirmed yet.

In other news, here are the minimum to extreme PC system requirements for Forza Horizon 6. Additionally, Playground Games has revealed a host of new details surrounding the campaign and progression. What are your thoughts on the Limited Edition Forza Horizon 6 Xbox accessories? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Embark Studios delaying the ARC Raiders 1.23.0 update. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: ARC Raiders Update 1.23.0 Full Patch Notes
item.content:encoded:
Embark Studios has just released Patch 1.23.0 for ARC Raiders, and it’s a relatively small update that focuses on bug fixes across numerous aspects of the game. That being said, a new cosmetic set has arrived in the store to sweeten the deal, with the Vanguard Set now available for purchase.

This update comes after the highly anticipated Flashpoint update, which added a variety of new content to the game, including a new Major Map Condition and ARC threat: the devastating Vaporizer.

ARC Raiders Updates Numerous Bugs & Close Scrutiny

Live service titles like ARC Raiders are bound to be hit with new waves of bugs and glitches fairly regularly, thanks to the constant arrival of updates and content. Some can be silly, whilst others can be match-ruining, and update 1.23.0 impacts all of the above.

Some of the standout fixes include a return to form for the Rocketeer, as it will now sound its normal combat alert sound instead of the Vaporizers, as well as some AI adjustments for ARC during the Close Scrutiny Major Map Condition.

There’s plenty more in isolation, so for those of you interested in the minutia, here’s the full ARC Raiders Update 1.23.0 Patch Notes.

Full ARC Raiders Update 1.23.0 Patch Notes

ARC:

  • Fixed an issue that caused Rocketeers to use an incorrect combat alert sound.

Gameplay:

  • Fixed an issue where two Trigger ’Nades would sometimes deal three times the damage when detonated next to each other.
  • Fixed an issue that would cause items to not be used as soon as possible when holding fire and swapping to them.
  • Fixed an issue where weapons and items would fire automatically.
  • Fixed a shoulder swap issue where the camera would stay only on one side.
  • Fixed an exploit where an anvil splitter could be used without the penalty for dispersion.
  • Barricades can no longer be placed on Ziplines.

Maps:

  • Fixed an issue where players could get set on fire outside of the locked room in Medical Research on Stella Montis.
  • Fixed a spot on Stella Montis where players could be shot through the floor.
  • Fixed an issue where some staircases were missing in Buried City.
  • Fixed some instances where the code printer could not be interacted with during Locked Gate.

Close Scrutiny:

  • Changed the movement speed for Rocketeers and Vaporizers so they don’t behave strangely while idling.
  • Fixed an issue where reconnected players would not see Assessor platforms correctly.
  • Fixed an issue where Vaporizers would get stuck when getting close to an Assessor.
  • Fixed an issue that would prevent an Assessor from flying back into orbit. Fixed an issue where breach platforms could break on an Assessor when spamming the Breach & Search prompts preventing it from returning to orbit.
  • All ARC summoned by the Assessor will now correctly leave the area and despawn if they remain idle for a long time.
  • Pinging an Assessor in the map screen now correctly reflects the actual location.
  • Fixed an issue where players could get stuck when jumping from one platform to another on an Assessor.
  • Fixed a spot in Buried city where an Assessor and a Probe could land in the same spot.

Other:

  • Fixed an issue where the weapon upgrade UI would show incorrect upgrade tiers.
  • Fixed an issue that caused fully transparent helmet visors.
  • Fixed some instances where certain visual effects could cause crashes. We are continuing to investigate all cases that cause crashes.

What do you make of the ARC Raiders Update 1.23.0 Patch Notes? Did they miss any bugs you’re encountering? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, check out the full reveal of the Forza Horizon 6 map, as well as the one-man Tarkov competitor, which has launched to thousands of positive reviews.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/arc-raiders-update-1-23-0-full-patch-notes/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Forza Horizon 6 Full Japan Map Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Playground Games has just revealed the Full Summer Japan map for Forza Horizon 6.

The next installment of the highly popular racing series, Forza Horizon 6, is all set to arrive on May 16, 2026. Ahead of the launch, the developers have already revealed the official minimum to extreme PC system requirements for the game. Now, players can have a look at all the areas that they will be able to explore in the Japan map.

Forza Horizon 6 Japan Summer Map Revealed

A new post on the official Forza Horizon X account (formerly Twitter) reveals the entire map that players can expect in the game. It covers a huge area, from the Alps’ snow-covered hills to Tokyo’s bustling city roads to peaceful country lanes. One detail that players will notice is that the map says ‘Summer Season’, which could mean that the areas and POIs may change with seasonal map updates. Players will have to wait and see how that system works.

As we all know, the latest installment to the Forza Horizon series takes us to the breathtaking landscapes of Japan. The developers have also confirmed that this is their “most dense and vertical map yet.” The game will also immerse you in Japanese car culture, with over 550 real-world cars, including “classics, featuring cutting-edge engine audio and updated steering animations with up to 540 degrees of wheel rotation.”

In other news, Game Pass subscribers still have to pay $60 for Forza Horizon 6’s 4-day early access. Additionally, gameplay footage for Forza Horizon 6 has surfaced online, but it reveals a critical flaw in the game’s traffic density. What are your thoughts on the Forza Horizon 6 full Japan map reveal? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about over 300,000 players entering Gray Zone Warfare to explore the recent Spearhead update. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/forza-horizon-6-full-japan-map-revealed/

item.title: Pokémon Champions Codes: All Active Mystery Gift Codes & How to Redeem Them
item.content:encoded:
A new Pokémon game is available worldwide with the release of Pokémon Champions, and while the approach is different from other titles, there are still Mystery Gift codes to redeem.

Pokémon is in the midst of a busy year, having already re-released Fire Red and Leaf Green on Nintendo Switch alongside the record-breaking success of Pokopia, and Pokémon Champions is the latest release, which is set to shake up the competitive scene.

If you’re looking for a boost in Pokémon Champions through some free rewards and Mystery Gift codes, Insider Gaming has all the details.

All Available Pokémon Champions Mystery Gift Codes

Mystery Gifts are available in Pokémon Champions through various means, including the redemption of special codes.

The Pokémon Company regularly releases codes for a variety of games to unlock extra rewards, though there are also additional goodies to claim without having to redeem any code whatsoever.

  • More Insider Gaming: Pokémon Champions Mobile Release Period Revealed

The table below shows all Mystery Gifts available in Pokémon Champions. This article will be updated regularly when any fresh codes are released!

How to Redeem Mystery Gift Codes in Pokémon Champions

Similar to other Pokémon games, redeeming Mystery Gifts in Pokémon Champions requires the use of a special menu option.

As always, an internet connection is required to access the Mystery Gift feature, but given that Pokémon Champions requires a constant internet connection to play, this shouldn’t present any issues.

  • More Insider Gaming: How to Connect Pokémon Champions to Pokémon Home

Unlike other games, however, redeemed rewards are not immediately activated, and there’s an extra step for redemption.

The steps below outline the exact process to redeem Mystery Gift codes in Pokémon Champions.

  1. Log in to your Pokémon Champions account.
  2. On the main menu, select the ‘Submenu’ option in the bottom-right corner.
  3. Scroll down to the ‘Mystery Gift’ option.
  4. In the pop-up that appears, enter the required code and select confirm.
  5. Close the pop-up that appears confirming redemption, and close the Submenu.
  6. Select the ‘Mailbox’ option at the bottom of the screen.
  7. Open the message containing the reward you have earned.
  8. Confirm the redemption of the reward.

What are your initial impressions of Pokémon Champions? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Pokémon, find out when the first events using Champions for VGC will take place, and check out all the release details for Chaos Rising in the Pokémon TCG.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/pokemon-champions-mystery-gift-codes/

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For April 8, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, April 8, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Part of the body
  • Hint 2: Part of your arm
  • Hint 3: If you’re naughty, you might get a smack on the _____

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Hand
  • Arm
  • Knee
  • Neck
  • Shoulder
  • Cuff
  • Finger
  • Forearm
  • Ankle

Today’s Contexto Answer For April 8, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Wrist

The Wrist is the narrow part of the arm above the hand that can bend to move the hand in different directions.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on April 9.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • Wordle
  • NYT Connections

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/todays-contexto-hints-answer-for-april-8-2026/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Over 300,000 Players Explored Gray Zone Warfare’s Latest Update
item.content:encoded:
Gray Zone Warfare’s Spearhead update is in full flow, and MADFINGER Games is reaping the fruits of its success. In recent days, the game has skyrocketed up Steam’s best-seller charts, settling in fifth place overall amid an ongoing sale and the arrival of the long-awaited 0.4 overhaul.

In a new infographic posted on social media, the team at MADFINGER Games revealed just how many players have found their way into Lamang with the Spearhead update. It has widely been considered the most substantial update in the game’s two-year history.

Spearhead Forges The Way for Gray Zone’s Future

Spearhead is a monumental update packed with content, quality-of-life improvements, and neat features that make playing the game much more enjoyable. In our review of the 0.4 update, we awarded Gray Zone Warfare a score of 9 out of 10, indicative of just how far this open-world sandbox shooter has come since April 2024.

In a recent post on social media, the team at MADFINGER Games revealed that more than 314,000 players had found their way into Gray Zone Warfare in the days since Spearhead was released. That figure includes a peak concurrent count of more than 43,000, a number not seen since the game dropped in 2024.

That also included a peak daily active user count of 174,041 users.

On social and streaming platforms, Gray Zone Warfare found immense traction, hitting considerable highs on Twitch and trending on other sites, thanks to a creator-backed marketing campaign.

Gray Zone Warfare has entered a new era with the Spearhead update, and fans of the shooter are grateful for the work that MADFINGER keeps pouring into the ecosystem.

Have you experienced Gray Zone Warfare’s Spearhead update yet? Let us know what you think about the changes on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that the latest ARC Raiders update has been delayed

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: ARC Raiders Vanguard Set Launch Delayed; Drops Later Today
item.content:encoded:
ARC Raiders fans were left wanting yesterday when the regularly scheduled update was delayed by Embark Studios, hampering the arrival of the highly anticipated Vanguard Set. The new cosmetics pack has been on fans’ minds ever since the drop was teased in recent promotional materials, and it was supposed to land yesterday, April 7.

The Vanguard Set is coming with update 1.23.0, a relatively minor update that features the awaited store item and several bug fixes.

Where is the Vanguard Set in ARC Raiders?

If you logged into ARC Raiders yesterday expecting to see the Vanguard Set sitting before you in the store, it’s understandable if you were rendered confused. ARC Raiders updates always happen on a Tuesday, but Embark Studios delayed this week’s 1.23.0 update by 24 hours, per a message on the game’s official Discord server:

Raiders!

Patch 1.23.0 is moved until tomorrow at the usual time. It comes with the highly anticipated Vanguard Set and a number of fixes.

If there’s one thing Embark Studios has been doing right with ARC Raiders, it’s the drip-fed cosmetics bundles, almost all of which are entirely on theme and authentic to the game’s universe. The team promised a long time ago that they wouldn’t lean into unwanted collaborations and bizarre skin packs, and the Vanguard Set is a testament to that fact.

It features a heavily-armored individual with a ballistic helmet and face shield, the kind of outfit you’d see in another popular extraction shooter, Escape from Tarkov.

It’s a beefy outfit that’s admittedly a world away from some of the more perplexing packs, like the Wasp Hunter bundle that was released around the launch of the recent Flashpoint update. That outfit, which boasts a higher-than-average price point, comes with one of the strangest pieces of headgear we’ve seen since the game dropped in October 2025.

Here are the launch times for the ARC Raiders 1.23.0 update:

  • PT: 3 AM
  • ET: 6 AM
  • BST: 11 AM
  • CST: 12 PM
  • JST: 7 PM

Are you going to secure the ARC Raiders Vanguard Set? Let us know what you’re looking forward to about this game on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Road to Vostok has launched with solid reviews

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill
